name: League Platinum Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Special Categories (Travel, Airlines, Department Stores, Electronics & Durable Goods)
rewards.displayRate: 8 Reward Points / ₹150 spent on special categories

rewards.displayCategory: Other eligible spends (under ₹2 Lakhs annual spends)
Other eligible spends (above ₹2 Lakhs annual spends)

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 5,000 Reward Points (worth Rs 500) upon payment of joining fee

milestones.label: 4 free PVR movie tickets (up to ₹400 each) or 10,000 Reward Points on spending ₹1,25,000 every 6 months (up to twice a year)

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (max ₹3,500 per anniversary year)
Railway surcharge waiver (max ₹500 per anniversary year)
additionalDetails: Points can be redeemed via the Kotak Rewards portal (kotakrewards.com) at a value of ₹0.10 per point for vouchers and travel bookings.
Points can also be redeemed as statement credit at a value of ₹0.07 per point, with a minimum threshold of 2,000 points.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Shopping & gift vouchers via Kotak Rewards
Flight & hotel bookings via Kotak Rewards

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Redemption rate for vouchers and merchandise is 1 point = Rs 0.10. Cash statement credit rate is 1 point = Rs 0.07.
